Package com.pax.poslink.peripheries

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    ModemParameters.AsyncMode  
    ModemParameters.BaudRate  
    ModemParameters.SerialParam
    Serial parameters for Data Bits, Parity Check and Stop Bits.
    POSLinkPrinter.CutMode
    Paper cut mode
    POSLinkPrinter.GreyLevel
    Grey level for print color
    POSLinkPrinter.PrinterStatus  
    POSLinkPrinter.PrintListener  
    POSLinkPrinter.RecommendWidth
    The recommend pixel width for your bitmap in different devices.
    POSLinkScanDecoder.DecodeCallback  
    POSLinkScanner.IScanListener
    A scan listener which will callback ScanResult
    POSLinkScanner.ScannerListener Deprecated 
    POSLinkScanner.ScannerType  
    ScanCodeFormat
    The format of scan code.
    SerialPortParameters.ComPort
    The com port options.
    SerialPortParameters.ParityCheck
    The parity check options
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    BarcodeHelper
    A helper class for barcode to provide helper methods.
    BaseSystemManager
    About the POS basic system API.
    DeviceModel
    The device model.
    MiscSettings
    Some settings for Pax devices.
    ModemParameters
    The connect parameters for POSLinkModem.connect(Context, com.pax.poslink.peripheries.ModemParameters, int)
    PedManager
    About the API of Ped.
    PedManager.PedKeyInfo
    PedKeyInfo
    PiccManager
    About PICC API.
    POSLinkBluetoothPrinter
    Bluetooth Printer controller Need to add GLExtPrinter library.
    POSLinkCashDrawer
    This API is only available for PAX devices with cash drawer port, such as E500, E800, E700.
    POSLinkIcc
    About the API of the POS IC card.
    POSLinkModem
    This is API for modem(also called dial) of Pax device such as A80.
    POSLinkModem.ConnectResult
    The result for connection.
    POSLinkPrinter
    Printer controller This API is for Pax Android devices only, such as E500, A920.
    Add <uses-permission android:name="com.pax.permission.PRINTER"/> in Manifests when turn on Permission Check.
    POSLinkPrinter.PrintDataFormatter
    Used to format the string for POSLinkPrinter.print(String, PrintListener, boolean...)
    POSLinkScanDecoder
    This is used to decode a camera frame to get the barcode or QR code.
    This API is for Pax Android devices only, such as E500, A920.
    POSLinkScanDecoder.DecodeResult
    The decode result.
    POSLinkScanner
    Control Scanner
    This API is specifically designed for Pax Android devices, such as the E500, A920, and others.
    POSLinkScannerHw
    This API is for the laser scanner only.
    POSLinkSerialPort
    This allows you to use the serial port in the terminals.
    POSLinkSerialPort.ConnectResult
    The result for connection.
    ProcessResult
    Created by Leon.F on 2018/3/23.
    SerialPortParameters
    The connect parameters for POSLinkSerialPort
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    BaseSystemManager.EBeepMode  
    BaseSystemManager.LedMode  
    MiscSettings.ScreenOffTime
    Screen timeout options in Settings
    PedManager.KeyCode  
    PiccManager.DetectMode
